SEARCH
Package com.dua3.utility.data

Interface ImageUtil<I extends Image,MI extends MutableImage>

Type Parameters:
I - the image type returned by methods that create new images, i.e., load(Payload),
MI - the image type returned by methods that create new buffered images, i.e., createImage(int, int) (int, int)}, createImage(int, int) (int, int, int[])}, etc.
All Known Implementing Classes:
AwtImageUtil, FxImageUtil
public interface ImageUtil<I extends Image,MI extends MutableImage>
Interface for Image handling utility classes. The concrete implementation is automatically chosen at runtime.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static enum 
    ImageUtil.LoadOption
    Defines the options available for loading images.

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Magic
    MAGIC
    A constant Magic instance that defines the magic numbers for the know image formats.
    static final String
    MIME_TYPE_BMP
    Represents the MIME type for BMP image files.
    static final String
    MIME_TYPE_GIF
    Represents the MIME type for GIF (Graphics Interchange Format) images.
    static final String
    MIME_TYPE_JPEG
    Represents the MIME type for JPEG image files.
    static final String
    MIME_TYPE_PNG
    Represents the MIME type for PNG (Portable Network Graphics) image files.
    static final String
    MIME_TYPE_TIFF
    A constant representing the MIME type for TIFF (Tagged Image File Format) images.
    static final String
    MIME_TYPE_WEBP
    Represents the MIME type for the WebP image format.
    static final String
    MIME_TYPE_X_ICON
    A constant that represents the MIME type for icon images (image/x-icon).

    • getInstance

      static ImageUtil<? extends Image,? extends MutableImage> getInstance()
      Get FontUtil instance.
      Returns:

    • load

      default I load(Payload payload) throws IOException
      Load image.
      Parameters:
      payload - the Payload to load the image from
      Returns:
      the image
      Throws:
      IOException - if loading fails

      Load image.

      Returns:

      IOException - if loading fails

      loadOption - the load option to apply
      Returns:
      the image

    • createImage

      MI createImage(int w, int h, int[] data)
      Creates an image from premultiplied ARGB pixel data.
      Parameters:
      w - image width in pixels
      h - image height in pixels
      data - pixel data as premultiplied ARGB values
      Returns:
      a new mutable AWT image backed by the provided pixel data

    • createImage

      MI createImage(int w, int h)
      Create an empty MutableImage.
      Parameters:
      w - the image width
      h - the image height
      Returns:
      new MutableImage

    • premultiplyArgbInPlace

      default void premultiplyArgbInPlace(int[] argb)
      Premultiplies the RGB components of all pixels in-place. Input pixels are interpreted as straight-alpha ARGB values.
      Parameters:
      argb - the pixel array to modify in-place

    • unpremultiplyArgbInPlace

      default void unpremultiplyArgbInPlace(int[] argb)
      Un-premultiplies the RGB components of all pixels in-place. Input pixels are interpreted as premultiplied-alpha ARGB values.
      Parameters:
      argb - the pixel array to modify in-place

    • premultiplyArgb

      default int[] premultiplyArgb(int[] argb)
      Premultiplies the RGB components of all pixels and returns a new array. Input pixels are interpreted as straight-alpha ARGB values.
      Parameters:
      argb - the source pixel array
      Returns:
      a new array containing premultiplied-alpha ARGB values

    • unpremultiplyArgb

      default int[] unpremultiplyArgb(int[] argb)
      Un-premultiplies the RGB components of all pixels and returns a new array. Input pixels are interpreted as premultiplied-alpha ARGB values.
      Parameters:
      argb - the source pixel array
      Returns:
      a new array containing straight-alpha ARGB values

    • toImageBuffer

      default ImageBuffer toImageBuffer(Image img)
      Convert Image to ImageBuffer.
      Parameters:
      img - the image
      Returns:
      the ARGBImage

    • fromImageBuffer

      default MI fromImageBuffer(ImageBuffer img)
      Convert ImageBuffer to Image.
      Parameters:
      img - the ARGBImage
      Returns:
      the image

    • toImage

      default MutableImage toImage(Image image)
      Converts the given Image to a BufferedImage. If the input image is already an instance of BufferedImage, it is returned as-is. Otherwise, a new BufferedImage is created and populated with the ARGB data from the input image.
      Parameters:
      image - the image to convert; must not be null
      Returns:
      the converted BufferedImage

    • write

      default void write(Image image, OutputStream out, String mimeType) throws IOException
      Writes the given Image to the specified OutputStream in the specified image format.
      Parameters:
      image - the image to write; must not be null
      out - the output stream to write the image data to; must not be null
      mimeType - the MIME type of the image format (e.g., MIME_TYPE_PNG, MIME_TYPE_JPEG); must not be null
      Throws:
      IOException - if writing the image fails, including issues with the output stream or unsupported MIME type

    • getImageWriter

      default ImageWriter getImageWriter(String mimeType)
      Retrieves an ImageWriter instance for the specified MIME type.
      Parameters:
      mimeType - the MIME type of the image format (e.g., MIME_TYPE_PNG, MIME_TYPE_JPEG); must not be null
      Returns:
      an ImageWriter instance associated with the specified MIME type
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if no ImageWriter is available for the specified MIME type

    • getImageReader

      default ImageReader getImageReader(String mimeType)
      Retrieves an ImageReader for the specified MIME type.
      Parameters:
      mimeType - the MIME type of the image format, e.g., MIME_TYPE_PNG or MIME_TYPE_JPEG; must not be null
      Returns:
      the corresponding ImageReader for the specified MIME type
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if no ImageReader is found for the given MIME type

    • getImageWriter

      default ImageWriter getImageWriter(Payload payload)
      Retrieves an ImageWriter instance that can write images based on the MIME type derived from the provided Payload.
      Parameters:
      payload - the Payload containing the image data and magic bytes
      Returns:
      an ImageWriter capable of handling the image format from the payload

    • getImageReader

      default ImageReader getImageReader(Payload payload)
      Retrieves an ImageReader appropriate for the given Payload. The method determines the MIME type of the payload using its initial byte data and returns the corresponding ImageReader.
      Parameters:
      payload - the Payload containing the image data; must not be null
      Returns:
      an ImageReader for the MIME type associated with the provided payload
